{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/42569696?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pwnsauc3", "id": 42569696, "login": "pwnsauc3", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQyNTY5Njk2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pwnsauc3", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45697", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-693", "name": "Protection Mechanism Failure"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1336", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine"}], "description": "### Impact
- Unauthenticated users could submit crafted values into Hidden fields (with Default value → Custom) that were evaluated as Twig during submission handling, which could lead to serious compromise of the Craft site (depending on template/sandbox behavior).
- Sites with public Formie forms that include at least one Hidden field with that configuration.
- No CP login for the reported chain.

### Patches
- [2.2.20](https://github.com/verbb/formie/releases/tag/2.2.20), [3.1.24](https://github.com/verbb/formie/releases/tag/3.1.24)

### Workarounds
- Temporarily remove Hidden fields from public forms or switch Hidden default away from Custom where feasible
- Otherwise, upgrade to patched versions", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00475, "percentile": 0.37512}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T17:23:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45697"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T20:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T17:23:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/verbb/formie/security/advisories/GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2", "https://github.com/verbb/formie/commit/f690d5623163ce2a95da305238d6367575486ee3", "https://github.com/verbb/formie/releases/tag/2.2.20", "https://github.com/verbb/formie/releases/tag/3.1.24", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45697", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/verbb/formie/security-advisories/GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/verbb/formie", "summary": "Formie: Pre-authenticated server-side template injection in Hidden fields", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:32:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7m9-mwc2-g6w2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.24", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "verbb/formie"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0-beta.1, < 3.1.24"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.2.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "verbb/formie"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.2.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Formie: Pre-authenticated server-side template injection in Hidden fields
